annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: patriotic obligation and violation of law are framed through blood, trampling, and tearing
Civic obligation is understood through bodily sacrifice and material violation.
cmt.rival_reading: Revolutionary inheritance and legal liberty are treated as bodily/material things that can be spilled, trampled, or torn.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: ambition and genius are represented through animals, height, paths, bodily appetite, fire, or stretching
Political ambition is understood through embodied force and animal/combat imagery.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract ambition is repeatedly construed through embodied motion, animal rank, appetite, and fire.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: fame or memory persists or disappears as life, deathlessness, or downward sinking
Historical memory is understood through life/death and vertical motion.
cmt.rival_reading: Reputation and memory are treated through bodily life/death or physical descent.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: self-government is treated as a trial whose truth can be demonstrated
Political viability is understood through experiment and demonstration.
cmt.rival_reading: A political order is not a laboratory object, but its success is framed as a trial or proof.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.
